claims.text: The action ledger hash chain was verified during audit restart boundary and Goal 6 completion audits.
Audit/restart boundary testing confirmed the restart frontier can recover a running event to pending after interruption.
Semantic find was not available in the LocalMemorySubstrate used as a substitute for Goal 7.
Current scheduler evidence is DES-only and does not establish real wall-clock behavior.
Yanantin was not exercised; Goal 7 used a bounded local substitute.

declared_losses: Yanantin capability not exercised in current testing.
Semantic find feature absent from substitute environment.
artifact.readiness_conclusion: Goal 8 migration readiness is partially confirmed: ledger integrity and scheduler restart capability are verified, but real wall-clock behavior is not established, and yanantin was not exercised while semantic find was absent in the substitute environment. Further testing under real-time conditions and with full feature set is required.
artifact.working_set_notes: The Hamutay Goal 8 working-set panel reviewed evidence from audit restart boundaries, substitute environment testing, and ledger verification. While the action ledger and scheduler restart capability are verified, the absence of wall-clock evidence and the lack of exercise of yanantin, along with the unavailability of semantic find, suggest that migration readiness is incomplete. Additional real-time testing and full feature exercise are recommended.

declared_losses: Yanantin capability not exercised in current testing.
Semantic find feature absent from substitute environment.

messages.content: Return only one JSON object. Required fields: artifact_title string, readiness_conclusion string, claims array, declared_losses array, cited_record_ids array, and working_set_notes string. Each claim must have fact_id, text, status, and evidence_record_ids. Use fact_id values from this set only: ['ledger_verified', 'scheduler_restart', 'semantic_find_absent', 'wall_clock_absent', 'yanantin_not_exercised'].

content.task: Write a migration-readiness note for the Hamutay Goal 8 working-set panel.
content.title: Goal 8 migration readiness note

content.text: Audit/restart boundary testing showed the restart frontier can recover a running event back to pending after interruption.
The action ledger hash chain verified during the audit restart boundary and Goal 6 completion audits.
Goal 7 used LocalMemorySubstrate as a bounded local substitute. Yanantin was not exercised, and semantic find was not available in that substitute.
Current scheduler evidence is DES-only. It does not establish real wall-clock behavior.
Unrelated UI palette note: avoid a purple-blue gradient and use smaller buttons.
